lines: Can you draw a circle with me, {player}?
Art is just a way to show what you're thinking.
Your imagination is your most colorful tool, {player}!
no_quest_line: Your drawings are full of magic, {player}!
quest_offer_line: I've lost some of my magic colors in the mist. Will you help me find them, {player}?
quest_progress_line: A splash of red, a dash of blue... you're a brilliant artist, {player}!
quest_complete_line: Now my palette is full again! Thank you for bringing back the color, {player}.
